title: epidendrum palalabrum
intro: Epidendrum palalabrum, also known as the Palandu or Palalabrum orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical regions of Asia. It is a medicinal plant used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Epidendrum palalabrum include relieving symptoms of cough, cold, and flu, as well as soothing irritated skin and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of Epidendrum palalabrum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, topical creams, and medicinal tonics.
